  "claims": [
    "Employee stock ownership plans (ESOPs) and worker cooperatives can benefit both owners and employees.",
    "Transitions to employee ownership models like ESOPs are rare.",
    "Employee-owned businesses can create wealth-building opportunities for employees.",
